category_sources: Official GitHub README at https://github.com/danielgtaylor/jpeg-archive describes utilities for long-term photo archiving and serving over the web.
source_facts.description says 'Utilities for archiving JPEGs for long term storage'.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses 'JPEG Archive' at https://github.com/danielgtaylor/jpeg-archive.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the primary documentation surface and documents utilities, downloads, compiling, and installation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/danielgtaylor/jpeg-archive, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes command-line utilities, minimizing storage, and identifying duplicate or similar photos.
source_facts.executables lists jpeg-archive, jpeg-compare, jpeg-hash, and jpeg-recompress.
